transcript: Nomen. Coulson. Nice to see you still like to sleep on the job. You're still alive? But how? I saw you get shot. Well, I did get shot. And I am dead. Believe it or not, I'm a ghost. I think I've got some unfinished business or something. Do you know what kind of business? Yeah, I know. My only problem is that I don't have physical body, and I don't know how to possess anyone. Dying didn't come with a handbook, you know. So you need my help? Yep. Okay, what do you need? I need you to help me change the world. Since you're a well-known writer, it shouldn't be that hard. You can express your vision of change through your writings. Alright, I'll give it a shot. However, I do have another request. On my computer is a file with a list of names. These people, they don't deserve to live. It has names, addresses, any info you may need to find. In the drawers of my desk, you will find extra ammo and attachments, including sound suppressors. This binder has more names and addresses. So, you mean you want me to... I want you to execute all the ones I haven't checked off yet. Who are you? Because you're not the detective Coulson I know. Did you really know me? This is your chance to help me change the world. I can provide you with the resources and information necessary. You are my best friend, but I can't do this. This is the way to do it. Sure, the world may be bad now, but it can still change. People can change for the better. Plus, I resort to killing hype. I'd be no better than them. Keep telling yourself that. We both know what you have to do. DO IT FUCKER! I'm going to take a walk in the park to see what's going on. Go ahead and keep telling yourself that. We both know what you have to do.
